headline: Top Technology Executives Recognized at the 2026 CapitalCIO ORBIE Awards
summary: Leading CIOs honored for leadership, innovation, and business impact WASHINGTON, June 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The 2026 CapitalCIO ORBIE Awards honored leading chief information officers (CIOs) from Marriott International, Carlyle, HII, Virginia Tech, Appian, and OrthoVirginia for their exceptional leadership. Hosted by CapitalCIO, one of over 50 Inspire Leadership Network chapters, the prestigious award honors CIOs who drive business transformation and industry impact. This exclusive event

headline: 3 Consumer Stocks That Concern Us
summary: Most consumer discretionary businesses succeed or fail based on the broader economy. Unfortunately, the industry’s recent performance suggests demand may be slowing as discretionary stocks’ 3.7% return over the past six months has trailed the S&P 500 by 2.5 percentage points.

raw.headline: 3 Consumer Stocks That Concern Us
raw.summary: Most consumer discretionary businesses succeed or fail based on the broader economy. Unfortunately, the industry’s recent performance suggests demand may be slowing as discretionary stocks’ 3.7% return over the past six months has trailed the S&P 500 by 2.5 percentage points.

headline: Punch List: Skanska wins 2 jobs, 2 firms make executive moves
summary: The Stockholm-based contractor won contracts worth a collective $580 million, as STV and Fluor made changes in the office.
